name: OCR
summary: OCR and document text extraction routes for PDFs, images, screenshots, UI captures and URI-fetched blobs.
description: Provides ocr:// routes backed by local system tools and optional source checkouts: semcod/imgl for screenshot OCR and UI boxes, wronai/img2nl for image analysis, wronai/ocr for heavier PDF OCR, and oqlos/vql as the downstream layout schema. The connector can OCR a local path, a base64 payload, or a blob fetched from another node through a URI such as fs://host/file/query/blob.

env.URI_OCR_SOURCE_PATHS: Optional path list for local source checkouts. Defaults include /home/tom/github/semcod/imgl, /home/tom/github/wronai/img2nl/src, /home/tom/github/wronai/ocr, /home/tom/github/oqlos/vql/src.
env.URI_OCR_LATEST_IMAGE: Default image path used by ocr://host/image/latest/query/text.
env.URI_OCR_ENABLE_AI: Set to 1 to allow auto mode to call the heavier wronai/ocr Ollama backend.
